headline: 'Playing defense' during Iran conflict: Strategist talks defense stock picks
summary: Defense contractors are back in focus as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East push investors toward the sector. Companies like L3Harris Technologies (LHX), Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII), and Kratos Defense & Security Solutions (KTOS) are drawing attention for their roles in missile defense systems, nuclear-powered submarines, and drone technology. Hennion & Walsh CIO Kevin Mahn joins anchor Julie Hyman to discuss how investors should be “playing defense with defense,” as governments ramp up spending on military technology. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Exelon Powers Up As Defense Stock Hits New High
summary: This power stock hits a high and is in a buy zone of a flat base. And an aluminum stock attempts to break out after dancing around a new high.

headline: A Look At L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Valuation As Defense Spending And Missile Spin Off Plans Gain Attention
summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) is back in focus as investors weigh rising global defense spending, a planned Missile Solutions spin off, record Q4 orders of US$27.5b, and fresh leadership appointments. See our latest analysis for L3Harris Technologies. At a share price of US$357.88, L3Harris has delivered a 24.72% 90 day share price return and a 72.37% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has been building as investors react to higher defense demand, record orders and recent...
